sc.political.s: FEC: $2.1M to Democrats, $1.8M to Republicans 2020-2024 cycle.
sc.dei.s: Published DEI strategic plan 2021; HRC CEI score 95 (2024); disclosed workforce demographics.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events on record; no verified science-based emissions targets disclosed.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities on record.
sc.charity.s: Elevance Health Foundation: $300M+ committed 2020-2024 to health equity, underserved communities.
sc.animals.s: Healthcare company; animal testing not applicable.
sc.guns.s: Health insurance company; no firearms manufacturing or retail.
sc.privacy.s: Anthem data breach 2015: 78.8M records exposed; settled with HHS for $115M (2017).
sc.execPay.s: CEO compensation 2023: ~$25.7M vs. median worker ~$65K = 395:1 ratio.
